communityHub.title: Explore Our Device Community On Telegram
communityHub.summary: Give users, testers, and builders one shared place for discussion, quick help, screenshots, and release-side updates around the Nothing Phone 2a and 2a Plus.
highlights: Bring ROM users, maintainers, and testers into one shared device space.
Keep discovery simple for new users who want updates, help, and flash guidance.
Link the homepage to the wider community without mixing it into per-ROM release posts.

sourceChanges.title: Framework and SystemUI
sourceChanges.summary: Recent interface work focused on tightening motion, spacing, and readability across the current Android 16 base.
items: Quick settings and notification spacing were refined for better visual balance.
App launch and return motion was tightened to feel quicker without becoming abrupt.
Lockscreen contrast tuning improved legibility across brighter wallpapers.

sourceChanges.title: Device Tree and Vendor
sourceChanges.summary: Shared device-side cleanup reduced duplicated maintenance between the Nothing Phone 2a and 2a Plus trees.
items: Common overlay and property alignment was cleaned up across both variants.
Vendor-side adjustments were grouped to make future bring-up changes easier to track.
Per-device divergence remains easy to call out when one lane needs separate handling.

sourceChanges.title: Kernel and Thermal
sourceChanges.summary: Kernel-side and thermal-facing work continues to be summarized in plain language rather than raw commit lists.
items: Thermal messaging stays readable for users while still useful to testers.
Kernel sync notes are short, specific, and easy to scan before flashing.
The layout leaves room for follow-up fixes or hot builds when needed.

builderUpdates.title: Per-ROM release tracking is now the default layout
builderUpdates.summary: Each ROM now has a dedicated lane for version context, device targeting, and release-side notes instead of sharing one mixed release grid.

builderUpdates.title: Every tracked ROM now covers pacman and pacmanpro
builderUpdates.summary: The full current lineup supports both Nothing Phone 2a (pacman) and Nothing Phone 2a Plus (pacmanpro), so device coverage now stays aligned across the release hub.

builderUpdates.title: The site is ready for more ROMs and more release lanes
builderUpdates.summary: The current structure scales cleanly if more ROMs, devices, or release metadata need to be added later.

supportMatrix.name: Nothing Phone 2a
supportMatrix.summary: Every ROM currently listed in the directory supports pacman with the same shared release flow and per-ROM tracking.

supportMatrix.name: Nothing Phone 2a Plus
supportMatrix.summary: Every ROM currently listed in the directory also supports pacmanpro, keeping the 2a Plus on the same release cadence.

expansionCards.title: Add More ROMs
expansionCards.summary: New ROMs can be added by extending the same content model without redesigning the homepage structure.

expansionCards.title: Map Release Links
expansionCards.summary: Telegram release posts can be attached per ROM, per build, and swapped in without touching the layout itself.

expansionCards.title: Extend the Workflow
expansionCards.summary: The current setup is ready for future JSON feeds, Git-based release data, or a lightweight content workflow when needed.
